canonical_definition: A bilingual benchmark for evaluating table-to-report generation, comprising 457 real-world industrial tables across 19 domains, with 910 questions and annotated report keypoints to assess numerical accuracy, information coverage, and general quality.
papers: Bias Beware: The Impact of Cognitive Biases onLLM-Driven Product Recommendations

definitions.paper: Bias Beware: The Impact of Cognitive Biases onLLM-Driven Product Recommendations

relationships.paper: Bias Beware: The Impact of Cognitive Biases onLLM-Driven Product Recommendations
relationships.evidence: “we introduce T2R-bench, a high-quality benchmark designed to evaluate the reasoning capabilities of LLMs in the table-to-report task”

emnlp25: Bias Beware: The Impact of Cognitive Biases onLLM-Driven Product Recommendations
